title: WE Learn 实用综合教程 B1U4-U8 翻译练习

questions.title: 【B1U4 Movies · 中译英】孙悟空是我最喜欢的动画人物。
options: Monkey King is my favorite cartoon character.
I am fond of Monkey King much better than any other cartoon characters.
questions.correct_answer: A. Monkey King is my favorite cartoon character.

questions.title: 【B1U4 Movies · 中译英】李小龙的电影打破了西方对中国人的刻板印象。
options: Bruce Lee's films have broken out the Western old impression of Chinese people.
Bruce Lee's films have smashed the Western stereotype of Chinese people.
questions.correct_answer: B. Bruce Lee's films have smashed the Western stereotype of Chinese people.

questions.title: 【B1U4 Movies · 中译英】现在中国电影在欧美国家很受欢迎。
options: Now Chinese films have popularity very much in Europe and America.
Chinese movies are very popular in Europe and America now.
questions.correct_answer: B. Chinese movies are very popular in Europe and America now.

questions.title: 【B1U4 Movies · 中译英】从十四世纪开始，中国传统皮影戏传播到波斯、阿拉伯、土耳其、泰国、日本、英格兰、意大利等地。
options: From the 14th century, Chinese Shadow Play spread to Persia, Arab, Turkey, Thailand, Japan, England, Italy and so on.
From the 14th century, Chinese Shadow Play was sent to Persia, Arab, Turkey, Thailand, Japan, England, Italy and so on.
questions.correct_answer: A. From the 14th century, Chinese Shadow Play spread to Persia, Arab, Turkey, Thailand, Japan, England, Italy and so on.

questions.title: 【B1U4 Movies · 中译英】昆曲自明代中叶以来独领中国剧坛近300年。
options: Since the middle of the Ming Dynasty, Kunqu has dominated the Chinese theatrical world for nearly 300 years.
Kunqu has dominated the Chinese theatrical world since nearly 300 years in the mid-Ming Dynasty.
questions.correct_answer: A. Since the middle of the Ming Dynasty, Kunqu has dominated the Chinese theatrical world for nearly 300 years.

questions.title:
【B1U4 Movies · 英译中】

One night he heard some mice in the wastebasket. He caught them and kept them in small cages on his desk. One of these little mice became his particular friend and gave him the idea for the famous cartoon character Mickey Mouse, a clean mouse in a clean world. In 1928 Mickey Mouse first appeared in a cartoon film.
questions.correct_answer: 一天晚上他听到废纸篓里有老鼠的声音。他把老鼠抓来关在小笼子里，摆在了桌上。其中一只小老鼠成了他特殊的伙伴，给他带来了创作著名卡通形象米老鼠——一只生活在纯洁世界里的纯洁的小老鼠——的灵感。1928年，米老鼠首次在卡通电影中亮相。

questions.title: 【B1U5 Our Earth · 中译英】我们应当勇敢地承担起对地球的责任。
options: We should bravely accept our responsible for the earth.
We should bravely take our responsibility for the earth.
questions.correct_answer: B. We should bravely take our responsibility for the earth.

questions.title: 【B1U5 Our Earth · 中译英】地球日让人们更关注环境问题。
options: The Earth Day draws more attention to environmental problems.
The Earth Day makes people close attention to environmental issues.
questions.correct_answer: A. The Earth Day draws more attention to environmental problems.

questions.title: 【B1U5 Our Earth · 中译英】全球许多地标建筑响应“地球一小时”的号召，在每年3月最后一个星期六熄灯一小时。
options: To answer "Earth Hour", many landmark buildings around the world turning off lights one hour on the last Saturday of every March.
Many global landmark buildings respond to the call of "Earth Hour" by switching off lights one hour on the last Saturday of every March.
questions.correct_answer: B. Many global landmark buildings respond to the call of "Earth Hour" by switching off lights one hour on the last Saturday of every March.

questions.title: 【B1U5 Our Earth · 中译英】绿水青山就是金山银山。
options: Green waters and mountains are golden mountains and silver mountains.
Clear waters and green mountains are as valuable as mountains of gold and silver.
questions.correct_answer: B. Clear waters and green mountains are as valuable as mountains of gold and silver.

questions.title: 【B1U5 Our Earth · 中译英】走向生态文明新时代，建设美丽中国，是实现中华民族伟大复兴的中国梦的重要内容。
options: Walk to a new ecological civilization, build a beautiful China and realize the Chinese great rejuvenation are the important parts of the Chinese dream.
Moving towards a new era of ecological civilization and building a beautiful China is an important part of realizing the Chinese dream of the great rejuvenation of the Chinese nation.
questions.correct_answer: B. Moving towards a new era of ecological civilization and building a beautiful China is an important part of realizing the Chinese dream of the great rejuvenation of the Chinese nation.

questions.title:
【B1U5 Our Earth · 英译中】

Earth Hour started in 2007 in Sydney, Australia when 2.2 million people and more than 2,000 businesses turned their lights off for one hour to take a stand against climate change. Only a year later Earth Hour had become a global movement with more than 50 million people from 35 countries. Global landmarks such as the Sydney Harbour Bridge, CN Tower in Toronto, Golden Gate Bridge in San Francisco, and Rome's Colosseum, all stood in darkness, as symbols of hope for a cause that grows more urgent by the hour.
questions.correct_answer: “地球一小时”始于2007年澳大利亚悉尼，220万人、2,000多家企业熄灯一个小时，表达了反对气候变化的立场。仅仅一年之后，“地球一小时”就成了全球性的活动，有35个国家5千多万人参加。许多全球地标性建筑——如悉尼海港大桥、多伦多国家电视塔、旧金山金门大桥、罗马斗兽场——都屹立在黑暗中，成为对这项日益迫切的事业的希望的象征。

questions.title: 【B1U6 Part-time jobs · 中译英】他在公司里负责维护网站。
options: He is in charge of the website in the company.
He is responsible of the website in the company.
questions.correct_answer: A. He is in charge of the website in the company.

questions.title: 【B1U6 Part-time jobs · 中译英】我们在学校里读书，同时也在一些商店或公司兼职。
options: We study at school and at the same time we do some part-time jobs in some shops or companies.
We learn at school and do work in shops or companies at the same time.
questions.correct_answer: A. We study at school and at the same time we do some part-time jobs in some shops or companies.

questions.title: 【B1U6 Part-time jobs · 中译英】这家餐厅需要招聘几个服务生。
options: This restaurant is needed to employ several waiters.
This restaurant is in need of several waiters.
questions.correct_answer: B. This restaurant is in need of several waiters.

questions.title: 【B1U6 Part-time jobs · 中译英】一勤天下无难事。
options: There is nothing that cannot be accomplished through hard work.
Nothing is difficult without hard work.
questions.correct_answer: A. There is nothing that cannot be accomplished through hard work.

questions.title: 【B1U6 Part-time jobs · 中译英】我们要发扬追求卓越的工匠精神。
options: We will carry forward the craftsmanship spirit of striving for the best.
We will step up the craftsmanship spirit to strive for the best.
questions.correct_answer: A. We will carry forward the craftsmanship spirit of striving for the best.

questions.title:
【B1U6 Part-time jobs · 英译中】

There were already four male candidates in the boss's office. Obviously, the boss had difficulty in deciding whom he would employ because he said finally, "Well, I need to check your references before I can make a decision. I've got your telephone numbers and will call the boy I want. But remember whoever is going to be employed must be prepared to work here from 6:00 to 8:00 every evening. That's all."
questions.correct_answer: 餐厅老板的办公室里早已有了四个男性应聘者。很显然，老板也难以决定到底录用谁。他最后说，“那这样吧，我要先核实一下你们的简历才能做决定。我有你们的电话号码，我决定了录用谁，就会打电话通知他的。但是请记住：不管是准被录用，都必须每天晚上六点到八点过来上班。就这样。”

questions.title: 【B1U7 Health · 中译英】我爷爷奶奶身体很好，他们还时不时地外出旅游。
options: My grandparents are quite healthy and they travel from time to time.
My grandparents are in good condition and they travel sometimes.
questions.correct_answer: A. My grandparents are quite healthy and they travel from time to time.

questions.title: 【B1U7 Health · 中译英】如果你要保持健康，每天一定得摄入营养均衡的食物。
options: Be sure to eat a good balance of foods every day if you want to stay healthy.
If you want to keep healthy, make ensure to eat nutritious foods every day.
questions.correct_answer: A. Be sure to eat a good balance of foods every day if you want to stay healthy.

questions.title: 【B1U7 Health · 中译英】专家们认为健步走在许多方面有益于健康。
options: Experts believe that fitness walking is good for health in many ways.
Experts consider that fitness walking is good for health in any way.
questions.correct_answer: A. Experts believe that fitness walking is good for health in many ways.

questions.title: 【B1U7 Health · 中译英】常饮茶有助于预防心脏病，降低血压，增强记忆力。
options: Drinking tea often helps to prevent heart disease, lower blood pressure and increase memory.
Regular tea drinking can help prevent heart disease, lower blood pressure and improve one's memory.
questions.correct_answer: B. Regular tea drinking can help prevent heart disease, lower blood pressure and improve one's memory.

questions.title: 【B1U7 Health · 中译英】“太极”是一项用以防身、健体、冥想的中国传统武术运动。
options: Taiji or Tai Chi is a traditional Chinese martial art practiced for defense training, health benefits and meditation.
Taiji or Tai Chi is a traditional Chinese martial art for soldiers to defend themselves, build up their bodies and think deeply.
questions.correct_answer: A. Taiji or Tai Chi is a traditional Chinese martial art practiced for defense training, health benefits and meditation.

questions.title:
【B1U7 Health · 英译中】

If I just eat less, I will lose weight. Many people only focus on the amount of food they take in each day. They don't pay attention to what they're eating. So they may be eating less, but they're not eating healthily. Be sure to eat a good balance of different foods, including vegetables, fruits, meat, milk, and bread or rice. What you eat is just as important as how much you eat.
questions.correct_answer: “只要我少吃点，就可以减肥。”许多人只关注他们每天摄入的食物量，却不重视他们吃的是什么。所以他们可能吃得少了，但吃的食物却不够健康。膳食一定要均衡，蔬菜、水果、肉类、牛奶、面包或米饭等都要有所摄取。你吃了什么跟你吃了多少一样重要。

questions.title: 【B1U8 Festivals · 中译英】我们包装好给爷爷奶奶的礼物，要给他们一个新年的惊喜。
options: We wrapped up the gifts for our grandparents, give them a surprise for New Year's Day.
We packed up the gifts for our grandparents and wanted to give them a surprise on New Year's Day.
questions.correct_answer: B. We packed up the gifts for our grandparents and wanted to give them a surprise on New Year's Day.

questions.title: 【B1U8 Festivals · 中译英】制作精美的灯笼使院子里洋溢着节日的气氛。
options: The beautifully made lanterns took the yard full of a festive air.
The yard took on a festive air with the beautifully made lanterns.
questions.correct_answer: B. The yard took on a festive air with the beautifully made lanterns.

questions.title: 【B1U8 Festivals · 中译英】如今，中国人喜欢在微信等社交软件上互相问候新年好。
options: Nowadays, Chinese people like to exchange New Year greetings on WeChat or other social apps.
Nowadays, Chinese people like to greet each other with social apps such as WeChat on New Year.
questions.correct_answer: A. Nowadays, Chinese people like to exchange New Year greetings on WeChat or other social apps.

questions.title: 【B1U8 Festivals · 中译英】清明是中国传统二十四节气之一，意味着春耕播种的关键时期。
options: Qingming is one of the Chinese Twenty-Four Solar Terms, indicating that it is the crucial time for plowing and sowing in the spring.
One of the Chinese Twenty-Four Solar Terms, Qingming means the important period for plowing and sowing in the spring.
questions.correct_answer: A. Qingming is one of the Chinese Twenty-Four Solar Terms, indicating that it is the crucial time for plowing and sowing in the spring.

questions.title: 【B1U8 Festivals · 中译英】重阳节，又称“老人节”，是中国传统节日，在每年农历九月初九的庆祝。
options: Chongyang Festival, or "the Festival for the Elderly", is a traditional Chinese festival on the ninth day of the ninth month.
The Double Ninth Festival, also known as "the Seniors' Day", is a traditional Chinese festival, which is celebrated on the ninth day of the ninth lunar month.
questions.correct_answer: B. The Double Ninth Festival, also known as "the Seniors' Day", is a traditional Chinese festival, which is celebrated on the ninth day of the ninth lunar month.

questions.title:
【B1U8 Festivals · 英译中】

Setting off fireworks was once the most typical custom during the Spring Festival. However, in recent years, many cities have a firecracker ban to prevent accidents and threats to air quality. In many places, lion dancing, dragon dancing and temple fairs will be held for days. The Lantern Festival, which falls on the 15th day of the first lunar month, officially marks the end of the Spring Festival holiday season.
questions.correct_answer: 放烟花曾是春节期间最具代表性的习俗。但近年来，为了防止发生事故以及改善空气质量，许多城市都禁止燃放爆竹。在很多地方，舞狮、舞龙和庙会都会持续数天。农历正月十五的元宵节正式标志着春节假期的结束。
